member.name: T:Bonsai.Harp.Visualizers.TimelineGraphBuilder
member.summary: Represents an operator that configures a visualizer to plot each Harp message in the sequence in a synchronized rolling graph.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Harp.Visualizers.TimelineGraphBuilder.TimeSpan
member.summary: Gets or sets the optional maximum time range captured in the timeline graph. If no time span is specified, all data points will be displayed.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Harp.Visualizers.TimelineGraphView.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Clean up any resources being used.
member.param: true if managed resources should be disposed; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Bonsai.Harp.Visualizers.TimelineGraphView.InitializeComponent
member.summary: Required method for Designer support - do not modify the contents of this method with the code editor.

member.name: T:Bonsai.Harp.Visualizers.TimelineGraphVisualizer
member.summary: Provides a type visualizer to display a sequence of Harp messages as a synchronized rolling graph.

member.name: P:Bonsai.Harp.Visualizers.TimelineGraphVisualizer.TimeSpan
member.summary: Gets or sets the maximum time range, in seconds, displayed at any one moment in the graph.
